chapter_title: Operation of Authorized Emergency Vehicles & Certain Other Vehicles
text:
This chapter does not relieve the operator of an authorized emergency vehicle from:

(1) the duty to operate the vehicle with appropriate regard for the safety of all persons; or

(2) the consequences of reckless disregard for the safety of others.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 546. Operation of Authorized Emergency Vehicles & Certain Other Vehicles
##### § 546.005 — Duty of Care

This chapter does not relieve the operator of an authorized emergency vehicle from:

    (1) the duty to operate the vehicle with appropriate regard for the safety of all persons; or

    (2) the consequences of reckless disregard for the safety of others.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter does not relieve the operator of an authorized emergency vehicle from:
the duty to operate the vehicle with appropriate regard for the safety of all persons; or
the consequences of reckless disregard for the safety of others.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
